evaluation_scope: AEM-EVOLVE governance decisions — controlled environment — EthicBit / CEMU v3.7.0+

decision_log_entries.input_summary: Execute AI-ME v3.1 evidence for 12 gates — AEM-EVOLVE controlled environment
decision_log_entries.output_summary: 12 gate reports produced, all artifacts hash-verified, aggregate PASS
decision_log_entries.confidence: DETERMINISTIC — rule-based execution, no probabilistic inference
decision_log_entries.appealability_note: All gate decisions are traceable to explicit rules in gate verifier functions

appeal_procedure.appeal_path: Dispute any gate outcome by providing a counter-artifact with valid SHA256 hash and AEM v1.1 manifest entry. Submit to governance operator for re-evaluation.
appeal_procedure.appealability_basis: Each gate outcome is derived from enumerable rules — any outcome can be challenged by contesting the underlying artifact or hash record

known_limitations: Decision log covers AI-ME evidence execution session only
Not a production decision logging system
Legal appealability not claimed — governance appealability only
